name: Federal Check Cashing
description_short: CFSC is a check-cashing service offering no-account-needed check cashing, money transfers, bill pay, and prepaid cards at their Denver location on Federal Boulevard.
description_long:
CFSC (Community Financial Services) operates a check-cashing storefront at 1255 S Federal Boulevard in Denver, Colorado, serving customers who need financial services without a traditional bank account. The company positions itself as a one-stop shop for unbanked and underbanked consumers seeking quick access to cash and financial transaction services. CFSC cashes all types of checks—personal, business, and tax refund checks—without requiring a bank account, credit check, or extended waiting periods typical of traditional banks.

The company offers a broad range of financial services including check cashing, money orders, domestic and international money transfers via Western Union, electronic bill payment, prepaid debit cards (Yes! Debit Account), ATM access, prepaid cellular phone services, foreign currency exchange (80+ currencies), phone resale through EcoATM kiosks, gold buying, and transit ticket purchases. Their hours are extended (8am-8pm weekdays, 8am-6pm weekends), accommodating working customers who cannot visit traditional banks during standard business hours. The Denver location operates with a direct phone line (303-628-7000) for service confirmation.

CFSC differentiates itself through immediate fund availability without account requirements, acceptance of multiple government-issued photo IDs for verification, and a physically accessible storefront model. The company leverages partnerships with major financial services brands (Western Union for transfers, Yes for debit cards, Boost for prepaid phone services, EcoATM for phone resale, and others) to expand service offerings. Their emphasis on accessibility for customers without traditional banking relationships is a key market position.

However, check-cashing services typically charge fees per transaction that are not disclosed on the website, making true cost comparison impossible from available information. The company does not advertise specific fee structures, rates, or cost comparisons against alternatives. As a location-specific storefront rather than a national chain or online service, availability and service quality depend entirely on this single Denver location's operations.
address: 880 S Federal Blvd B, Denver, CO 80219

company_info.headquarters: 880 S Federal Blvd B, Denver, CO 80219

pros: No bank account required to cash checks
Extended hours (8am-8pm weekdays, 8am-6pm weekends) accommodate working customers
Immediate fund availability without multi-day clearing periods
Accepts multiple government-issued photo ID types for verification
No credit check required for prepaid debit card (Yes! Debit Account)
One-stop convenience: check cashing, bill pay, money transfers, and card services at single location
International money transfer capability via Western Union partnership
cons: No fee schedule disclosed on website; per-transaction check-cashing fees likely higher than bank alternatives
Single location limits accessibility to Denver area residents only
No online or remote check-cashing option; requires in-person visits
Limited service availability confirmation needed by phone call before visiting
Prepaid debit cards require no credit check but offer no credit-building benefit
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked Denver residents without access to traditional bank accounts
Small business owners needing immediate check cashing without business account setup
Workers seeking extended-hours financial services outside traditional banking windows
diagnosis: CFSC is best for Denver-area residents and small business owners who need immediate check cashing without a bank account and value extended operating hours. The main caveat is that check-cashing fees are not disclosed, and as a single-location storefront, the service is geographically limited and requires in-person visits.
services: Domestic and international money transfers (Western Union)
meta_description: CFSC offers check cashing, money transfers, bill pay, and prepaid cards at their Denver location on Federal Boulevard.
